memories.content: Chose PostgreSQL over MySQL for production database due to better JSON support and JSONB indexing

Project uses node:sqlite built-in module, not better-sqlite3 library
Need to add rate limiting to API endpoints before launch
React component re-renders 3x per second due to missing useMemo in dashboard
Chose Redis for session caching because it supports TTL natively and scales horizontally
API response times improved 40% after adding database connection pooling
TypeScript strict mode catches null pointer issues at compile time, reducing runtime errors

Memory leak detected in WebSocket handler, connections not being closed on client disconnect

Search functionality complete with full-text search, filters, and pagination
